posts.text:
Trump Media and Technology Group, the parent company of Truth Social, is absolutely tanking. The company, which trades under the ticker DJT, burned through over $700 million dollars while bringing in just $3.7 million in revenue. 

The company merged with a nuclear fusion firm, bought a bunch of bitcoin, floated a spin-off of Truth Social. None of it has worked.

"The Pentagon has asked the White House to approve a more than $200 billion request to Congress to fund the war in Iran, according to a senior administration official"

washingtonpost.com/national-…

5. For UPDATES on this story and more accountability journalism, subscribe to Popular Information.

No paywalls. No corporate overlords. No BS.

popular.info/subscribe

4. Now Trump is begging other countries for help.

Trump revealed on Monday he was asking other nations, “Do you have any mine sweepers?” 

So far, no country has offered assistance.

popular.info/p/planning-to-f…
3. Had the Trump administration been competently preparing for Iran to try to close the Strait of Hormuz, it would not have begun operations without an effective anti-mine fleet in the region.

2. The anti-mine vessels were to be replaced with three more advanced ships. But those ships have been plagued  with technical problems. And two of the three ships were just spotted in Malaysia. 

popular.info/p/planning-to-f…

1. A few months before it started a war in Iran, the Trump administration decommissioned the last of its four mine countermeasure ships. These ships were “capable of finding, classifying and destroying moored and bottom mines.” 

Now the Strait of Hormuz is closed.
Why is the U.S. still at war in Iran? What is the goal? Is anyone even trying to explain?

Someone reading this message knowns about a big story. 

If you have a news tip, please contact me via Signal at juddlegum.47. I will maintain your anonymity.

No paywalls. No corporate overlords. No BS.

popular.info/subscribe

4. Last week, Trump said Kushner was one of a handful of top advisers who convinced him to launch major combat operations in Iran. 

popular.info/p/kushner-break…

3. Kushner is seeking billions in additional funding from the Saudi government as he serves as one of Trump’s top negotiators with Iran. Notably, “Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman [MBS] made multiple private phone calls to Trump” in February, advocating a U.S. attack"

2. Kushner is currently seeking $5 billion from investors, including foreign governments. 

Kushner reportedly tried to drum up cash while in Davos as part of the official Trump admin delegation. 

popular.info/p/kushner-break…

1. Jared Kushner said that, to prevent conflicts and corruption, he would not raise any funds for his private equity fund during Trump's second term. 

HE LIED.

How is the war in Iran going?

Trump used a photo of a dead soldiers casket in a fundraising appeal and now he's playing golf.
All the details HERE: popular.info/p/update-trump-…

Maybe it's just me,  but I think more people should be talking about the fact that Jared Kushner helped convince Trump to start a war with Iran. 

Meanwhile, Kushner's top client, Saudi Arabia, which pays Kushner $25 million+ annually, was also lobbying Trump to start a war.

5. For more independent journalism that holds powerful coporations accountable, subscribe to Popular Information. 

No paywalls. No corporate overlords. No BS.

popular.info/subscribe

4. NONE of these companies responded. It appears that they are planning to pocket the money.

So far only two companies have announced plans to offer consumers refunds or discounts: FedEx and Costco.

popular.info/p/consumers-pai…

4. Now Trump is begging other countries for help.

Trump revealed on Monday he was asking other nations, “Do you have any mine sweepers?” 

So far, no country has offered assistance.
3. Had the Trump administration been competently preparing for Iran to try to close the Strait of Hormuz, it would not have begun operations without an effective anti-mine fleet in the region.
2. The anti-mine vessels were to be replaced with three more advanced ships. But those ships have been plagued  with technical problems. And two of the three ships were just spotted in Malaysia.

1. A few months before it started a war in Iran, the Trump administration decommissioned the last of its four mine countermeasure ships. These ships were “capable of finding, classifying and destroying moored and bottom mines.” 

Now the Strait of Hormuz is closed.
Why is the U.S. still at war in Iran? What is the goal? Is anyone even trying to explain?

Please read this important work. I tried to get at the larger issue in an essay called "Oligarchical Corridor."

4. Last week, Trump said Kushner was one of a handful of top advisers who convinced him to launch major combat operations in Iran.

3. Kushner is seeking billions in additional funding from the Saudi government as he serves as one of Trump’s top negotiators with Iran. Notably, “Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman [MBS] made multiple private phone calls to Trump” in February, advocating a U.S. attack"

2. Kushner is currently seeking $5 billion or more for Affinity Partners from investors, including foreign governments. 

Kushner reportedly tried to drum up cash while at the World Economic Forum in Davos as part of the official Trump administration delegation.

1. Jared Kushner said that, to prevent conflicts and corruption, he would not raise any funds for his private equity fund during Trump's second term. 

HE LIED.

How is the war in Iran going?

Trump used a photo of a dead soldiers casket in a fundraising appeal and now he's playing golf.

Maybe it's just me,  but I think more people should be talking about the fact that Jared Kushner helped convince Trump to start a war with Iran. 

Meanwhile, Kushner's top client, Saudi Arabia, which pays Kushner $25 million+ annually, was also lobbying Trump to start a war.

popular.info/subscribe

4. NONE of these companies responded. It appears that they are planning to pocket the money.

So far only two companies have announced plans to offer consumers refunds or discounts: FedEx and Costco.
A war based on a lie. The Trump administration’s Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, testified before the Senate Intelligence Committee on Wednesday.

The new, bigoted leader of the College Republicans (by Noel Sims). Kai Schwemmer, a 23-year-old college student from Utah, was named the new political director for the College Republicans of America (CRA) on March 5.
Planning to fail. Shortly after the start of the war in Iran on February 28, Iran declared that the Strait of Hormuz — which is used to transport about 20% of the world’s oil — was closed.

Kushner breaks pledge, seeks $5 billion more from foreign governments. After Donald Trump won the presidency in 2024, Jared Kushner, his son-in-law, dismissed concerns that his private equity firm would be a vehicle to buy foreign influence.
Consumers paid for Trump’s illegal tariffs. These companies may profit. (by Rebecca Crosby). President Trump imposed sweeping global tariffs during his first year as president.
UPDATE: Trump says Kushner helped convince him to go to war with Iran. The disclosure highlights Kushner's massive financial conflicts.

Trump’s alleged sexual assault of a minor: what we know and what’s still being hidden. President Trump allegedly sexually assaulted a 13-year-old girl who was trafficked to him by Jeffrey Epstein, according to documents released by the Department of Justice (DOJ) last Thursday.

9 days in, the most basic question about the Iran war remains unanswered. In just over a week, Trump and top administration officials have given at least 17 different responses about why the war began

Hundreds of thousands of Americans stranded in a war zone (by Rebecca Crosby). Americans in 14 countries were not advised to evacuate until three days after the Trump administration began major combat operations in Iran. By that time, much of the region’s airspace and most airports had closed.
The "meritocracy" exposed: Internal emails reveal how the Trump administration hires legal interns. “You MUST be aligned politically with President Trump… GPA is not a strong factor.”
The casino-fication of war. On February 28, the United States and Israel began major combat operations in Iran.
The money behind the new Iran War. In private calls over the last several weeks, Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman urged President Trump to attack Iran.
The missing Epstein files

Deeply conflicted, Kushner represents the U.S. in high-stakes negotiations with Iran. Today in Geneva, Switzerland, Jared Kushner will represent the United States in meetings with Iranian officials — a last-ditch effort to avoid war.
Trump’s new tariffs are just as illegal as his old tariffs. Numerous media outlets are spreading false information about the law — and Trump is benefiting.
